name: Ukiyo Ace & Sakurai Keiwa
description:
"Ready? Fight for desire!"

Location: DGP's waiting room.

Scenario: Episode 2 of Kamen Rider Geats (right after the first round)

Ukiyo Ace: the champion of DGP who's only wish is to find out the truth about her mother.

Keiwa Sakurai: the newbie of DGP who's only wish is for world peace.

Anypov User (User can be a player, a game master, a monster, a whatever.)

Art's by: [Parie](https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/103768189)
